## During the February 2026 Azure Arc Server Forum, topics covered included Arc Server Reporting & Dashboard, VM Applications, and Windows Server 2016 ESUs.

Please find the [recording for the monthly Azure Arc Server Forum at YouTube!](https://youtu.be/uX4HgTul9NQ?si=vEGYr57CGLnefriQ)

During the February 2026 Azure Arc Server Forum, we discussed:

- **Arc Server Reporting & Dashboard** (Jeff Pigot, Sr. Solution Engineer): Check out this awesome visual reporting bringing together different management services and experiences across Azure Arc-enabled servers on GitHub at [Arc Software Assurance Benefits Dashboard.](https://github.com/wjpigott/ArcBenefitsDashboard/tree/main/workbook)
- **VM Applications** (Yunis Hussein, Product Manager): Shared private preview experience and capabilities for 3P Application Deployment and Patching on Azure Arc-enabled servers. Please fill out this [form](https://forms.office.com/r/qhQ4H2JrFU) to participate in Private Preview.
- **Windows Server 2016 ESUs** enabled by Azure Arc: Portal Experience Feedback (George Enninful): Please sign up on the [feedback form.](https://forms.office.com/Pages/DesignPageV2.aspx?prevorigin=shell&origin=NeoPortalPage&subpage=design&id=v4j5cvGGr0GRqy180BHbRyemPojJK7tEkoALdt6d-B9UOUpIVkNKMUZPVlpaV0dKQUI1UUxKUURUUy4u&topview=Preview)

To sign up for the Azure Arc Server Forum and newsletter, please register with contact details at [https://aka.ms/arcserverforumsignup/](https://aka.ms/arcserverforumsignup/).

For the latest agent release notes, check out [What's new with Azure Connected Machine agent - Azure Arc | Microsoft Learn](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-arc/servers/agent-release-notes).

Our March 2026 forum will be held on Thursday, March 26 at 9:30 AM PST / 12:30 PM EST. We look forward to you joining us, thank you!

Published Mar 12, 2026

Version 1.0

Author: Aurnov_Chattopadhyay
Title: Azure Arc Server Feb 2026 Forum Recap
Description:
Please find the [recording for the monthly Azure Arc Server Forum at YouTube!](https://youtu.be/uX4HgTul9NQ?si=vEGYr57CGLnefriQ)

During the February 2026 Azure Arc Server Forum, we discussed:

- **Arc Server Reporting & Dashboard** (Jeff Pigot, Sr. Solution Engineer): Check out this awesome visual reporting bringing together different management services and experiences across Azure Arc-enabled servers on GitHub at [Arc Software Assurance Benefits Dashboard.](https://github.com/wjpigott/ArcBenefitsDashboard/tree/main/workbook)
- **VM Applications** (Yunis Hussein, Product Manager): Shared private preview experience and capabilities for 3P Application Deployment and Patching on Azure Arc-enabled servers. Please fill out this [form](https://forms.office.com/r/qhQ4H2JrFU) to participate in Private Preview.
- **Windows Server 2016 ESUs** enabled by Azure Arc: Portal Experience Feedback (George Enninful): Please sign up on the [feedback form.](https://forms.office.com/Pages/DesignPageV2.aspx?prevorigin=shell&origin=NeoPortalPage&subpage=design&id=v4j5cvGGr0GRqy180BHbRyemPojJK7tEkoALdt6d-B9UOUpIVkNKMUZPVlpaV0dKQUI1UUxKUURUUy4u&topview=Preview)

To sign up for the Azure Arc Server Forum and newsletter, please register with contact details at [https://aka.ms/arcserverforumsignup/](https://aka.ms/arcserverforumsignup/).

For the latest agent release notes, check out [What's new with Azure Connected Machine agent - Azure Arc | Microsoft Learn](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-arc/servers/agent-release-notes).

Our March 2026 forum will be held on Thursday, March 26 at 9:30 AM PST / 12:30 PM EST. We look forward to you joining us, thank you!
